headline: Willis introduces Capacity Revenue Protection to help Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Maryland (PJM) energy producers to navigate increasing market uncertainty
summary: NEW YORK, June 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), today announced the launch of Capacity Revenue Protection, an innovative solution designed to help PJM energy producers safeguard revenue when physical damage leads to UCAP (Accredited Unforced Capacity) reductions and prolonged capacity payment impacts. headline: WTW receives DFSA licence approval to operate investment business in Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC)

headline: Willis Towers Watson buys digital asset insurance platform Redefind
summary: Redefind's co-founders, Richard Daws and Connor Edward, have joined WTW following completion of the transaction.
